title: Build a Magnetic Compass
instructions_for_student: Drag the six step cards into the correct order to build a magnetic compass. Start from collecting materials and end with floating the cork.

additionalProps.title: Build a Magnetic Compass
additionalProps.subtitle: Drag each step card into the correct order

steps.text: Collect cork, needle, magnet, bowl, and water
steps.hint: Always start by collecting all the materials you need!

steps.text: Stroke needle with magnet 30–40 times in one direction
steps.hint: You need to magnetise the needle before testing it.
Test the needle after magnetising — not before!
The cork must hold the needle before you fill the bowl.
Fill the bowl with water before floating the cork.

steps.text: Float cork in water and observe direction
steps.hint: Floating the cork is the final step — observe the direction!

agent_readme.description: A drag-and-drop sequencing tool where students arrange 6 shuffled procedure cards into the correct order for building a homemade magnetic compass. Correct placements lock green with a checkmark. Incorrect placements bounce back with a contextual hint. Completion triggers a confetti screen with the full ordered procedure summary.
agent_readme.validation: card.id === slotIndex + 1 (each card's id must equal its intended 1-based position)

title.description: Main heading shown at top of tool

subtitle.default: Drag each step card into the correct order

completionMessage.description: Headline text on the completion screen

steps.description: Array of exactly N step cards. IDs must be 1..N; the correct slot for a card = card.id - 1

text.description: Full step description displayed inside the slot

shortLabel.description: Compact label shown on the pool card chip

hint.description: Hint shown when card is placed in the wrong slot

customisation_examples._comment: Use fewer steps (e.g. 4 steps for simpler activity)

steps.hint: The needle needs to float freely.

steps.text: Collect iron nail, copper wire, and battery
steps.hint: You need all three components first!

steps.text: Wrap copper wire tightly around the nail
steps.hint: Coil the wire before connecting to the battery.

steps.text: Connect wire ends to battery terminals
Test by picking up paper clips

decision_tree.default_6_steps: Use the default steps array (as above) for Activity 4.4 from NCERT Grade 6 Science Chapter 4
decision_tree.fewer_steps: Reduce steps array length — tool auto-adjusts slot count to steps.length
decision_tree.different_topic: Replace all step objects with new content; ensure ids are sequential 1..N
decision_tree.change_hint: Edit the 'hint' field in any step object for targeted corrective feedback
